description.en: Retrieve information about the authenticated Medium user including username, name, and profile URL.
description.de: Ruft Informationen über den authentifizierten Medium-Benutzer ab, einschließlich Benutzername, Name und Profil-URL.
description.es: Retrieve information about the authenticated Medium user including username, name, and profile URL.
description.fr: Retrieve information about the authenticated Medium user including username, name, and profile URL.
description.ro: Retrieve information about the authenticated Medium user including username, name, and profile URL.
description.it: Retrieve information about the authenticated Medium user including username, name, and profile URL.

vars.API_KEY: env:MEDIUM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN|Get your integration token from Medium Settings > Security and apps
